rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, and fiberHomeomorph are unnecessarily restricted to singleton preimages {b} when their proofs work for any s : Set B; the eq_comm in fiberHomeomorph's proof is a concrete, diff-confirmed artifact of the over-specialization. Review 2's claim that the lemmas are 'at the right generality' is verifiably wrong against the diff.
